# sevalla_docker_registry (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a Sevalla Docker registry credential.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_docker_registry" "example" {
  id = "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
}

output "registry_name" {
  value = data.sevalla_docker_registry.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Docker registry credential.

### Read-Only

- `company_id` (String) The company ID that owns the Docker registry credential.
- `created_at` (String) When the Docker registry credential was created.
- `name` (String) The name of the Docker registry credential.
- `registry` (String) The Docker registry type (e.g., gcr, ecr, dockerHub, github, gitlab, digitalOcean, custom).
- `updated_at` (String) When the Docker registry credential was last updated.
- `username` (String, Sensitive) The username for the Docker registry.
